sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2410" key="ai(matekxusi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἱμᾰτεκχυσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n2410.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shedding of blood, Ep.Heb.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0291.tlg001:9:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
